gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 requested preserving V1BenchmarkEvidence positional compatibility by appending unexpected_arms after unexpected_datasets; the field order was fixed, verification was rerun, and the reviewer approved.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmarks.py tests/test_benchmark_runner.py tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -q -> 154 passed
what_changed: Added unexpected_arms to V1 benchmark evidence and issue reporting.
Serialized unexpected_arms in benchmark run v1_evidence records.
Required release evidence to keep unexpected_arms empty.
Added tests and docs for the expected-arm-only V1 evidence contract.
why: V1 release evidence should fail closed when extra benchmark arms are present, rather than silently treating mixed-arm reports as release-evaluable.
